ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chimps" (
  "chimp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chimpanzee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chimpanzee */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the chimpanzee resides */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the chimpanzee */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the chimpanzee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the chimpanzee */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the chimpanzee */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the chimpanzee */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the chimpanzee */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the chimpanzee */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions or preferences */,
  "last_health_checkup" TEXT /* Date of the last health checkup */,
  "caretaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary caretaker for the chimp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chimp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chimps_caretaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("caretaker_id") REFERENCES caretakers ("caretaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chimps_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "caretaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caretaker responsible for the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of chimps the location can accommodate */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., forest, grassland, indoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_caretaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("caretaker_id") REFERENCES caretakers ("caretaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caretakers" (
  "caretaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caretaker */,
  "caretaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the caretaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the caretaker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the caretaker */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the caretaker started their role */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "training_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications and training completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caretaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., agility, puzzle solving) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the competition takes place */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer responsible for the competition */,
  "prize_description" TEXT /* Description of the prizes */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES caretakers ("caretaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant in a competition */,
  "chimp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chimpanzee participating */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the chimpanzee in the competition */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the chimpanzee in the competition */,
  "time_completed" TEXT /* Time taken by the chimp to complete the competition */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or comments from the judges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_participants_chimp_id FOREIGN KEY ("chimp_id") REFERENCES chimps ("chimp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_participants_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candies" (
  "candy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candy */,
  "candy_name" TEXT /* Name of the candy */,
  "candy_type" TEXT /* Type of candy (e.g., fruit-based, chocolate) */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* Ingredients used in the candy */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the candy */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Caloric content of the candy */,
  "sugar_content" INTEGER /* Sugar content of the candy */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Flavor profile of the candy (e.g., sweet, sour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candies_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "primary_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "primary_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "primary_contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candy_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candy preference record */,
  "chimp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chimpanzee */,
  "candy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candy */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the preference */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the chimp consumes the candy */,
  "preference_level" INTEGER /* Level of preference (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candy_preferences_candy_id FOREIGN KEY ("candy_id") REFERENCES candies ("candy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candy_preferences_chimp_id FOREIGN KEY ("chimp_id") REFERENCES chimps ("chimp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "chimp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chimpanzee */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., feeding, training, medical check-up) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "caretaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caretaker who recorded the activity */,
  "activity_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the activity */,
  "activity_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the activity (e.g., successful, needs improvement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_chimp_id FOREIGN KEY ("chimp_id") REFERENCES chimps ("chimp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_caretaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("caretaker_id") REFERENCES caretakers ("caretaker_id")
)
